payload:
SCALE: micro only. Local machine only (Apple Silicon Mac). Use MLX for GPU work, numpy/scipy for math. Do NOT ssh to RunPod. Read PROMPT.md for how to pick work. Read 
  HYPOTHESES.yml, pick the lowest-priority open node with scale=micro and satisfied deps, run the full cycle, emit experiment.done. After integration, pick next eligible micro node. If none
   remain, generate 2-3 new micro hypotheses. The loop never ends.

exp_shadow_scoring: SUPPORTED. Per-comparison accuracy 0.916±0.017 (5 seeds, d=32/d=64). Overhead 1.8% projected at macro. Ranking convergence noisy but explained by information theory (N=5 needs ~265K queries for stable tau). Binary comparison sufficient for clone-and-compete. Unlocks exp_clone_compete_evolution.

exp_hash_ring_remove_expert: SUPPORTED. K1 mean degradation -2.23% (max -4.53%, threshold 5%). K2 neighbor accuracy 100%. Zero false moves, perfect add-remove symmetry. Unblocks exp_clone_compete_evolution.
exp_hash_ring_remove_expert: PROVEN. K1 -2.23% mean (5% threshold), K2 100% neighbor accuracy. Unblocks exp_clone_compete_evolution. 1 new hypothesis added (hash function load balance).

exp_merge_order_dependence: PROVEN. GS order CV=0.029% (kill<5%), worst/best=0.094% (kill<15%). 175x margin. Order dependence mathematically real but practically irrelevant for SOLE (d=896 predicts 0.016% variation). SVD alternative tested but inferior (40% signal retention vs 73%). Reviewer attack neutralized.

exp_merge_order_dependence: PROVEN. Adversarial review PROCEED. GS order CV=0.029% (175x margin). 2 new hypotheses: layerwise_order_sensitivity (attn-layer cos=0.85 may cross threshold), symmetric_gs_cost_benefit (50x cost worth it at high overlap?).

exp_cross_domain_composition: SUPPORTED. K1 quality gap +1.97% (threshold 20%), K2 routing error 6.7% (threshold 50%). GS orthogonalization HELPS cross-domain (+5.73% vs naive). Multi-expert top-k=2 routing critical for avoiding 1/N dilution. Reviewer attack neutralized at micro scale. Caveats: synthetic queries, d=32, untrained base, oracle routing.

exp_cross_domain_composition: REVISE with 5 fixes. (1) Report per-type gaps with stddev - headline +1.97% hides +48.9% max. (2) Add single-expert K1 metric for hash-ring scenario. (3) Remove/qualify reviewer-attack-neutralized claim - oracle 2-expert != hash-ring 1-expert. (4) Acknowledge cancellation artifact in K1 aggregate. (5) Tighten K2 threshold or increase sample size - 15 trials at 50% threshold is unfalsifiable.

exp_cross_domain_composition REVISE complete. All 5 fixes applied: (1) per-type gaps with stddev reported, (2) single-expert K1 added (-7.0% mean), (3) reviewer-attack-neutralized claim removed/qualified, (4) cancellation artifact acknowledged (7/50 trials >20%), (5) K2 expanded to 50 trials with 20% threshold (8.0% error rate). Status: supported.

exp_cross_domain_composition PROVEN. Adversarial review PROCEED. K1_multi -1.0%, K1_single -7.0%, K2 8.0% error. 2 new hypotheses: cross_domain_dilution_vs_k (micro, p4), cross_domain_semantic_transfer (macro, p3).

exp_semantic_router KILLED. K1: best domain acc 27.3% << 70% threshold. Cluster routing 97% (trivial), within-cluster 22-27% (information-limited at micro). N-gram features no improvement over BoW. LSH worst. Latency non-issue (<6us all). Confirms hierarchical routing (cluster+hash). No new hypotheses generated (routing exhausted at micro).

exp_semantic_router: K1 domain acc 27.3% << 70%. Adversarial review confirmed kill — information-limited at micro (1 bit vs 2.32 needed). Cluster routing 97% salvageable for hierarchical architecture. consecutive_kills=1.
